channel.title: mycatalog updates
channel.description: 'My Catalog' uses the IBM Cloud catalog API to retrieve data from the catalog. It attempts to be as accurate as possible. This feed shows additions, updates, removals from the catalog. Use with care. It is a work-in-progress :)

item.title: [updated] Cloud Logs (logs) has changed the description of the plan named standard
item.description:
*before*: Log consumption tier allocation is configured using the TCO Optimizer.
Priority insights log retention can be configured below and/or updated within the service settings after provision.
, *after*: Log consumption tier allocation is configured using the TCO Optimizer.
Priority insights log retention can be configured below and/or updated within the service settings after provision.
